name: Update Anti-Funnel Dashboard

on:
  schedule:
    # Corre a las 8:00 AM Ciudad de México (14:00 UTC)
    - cron: '0 14 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch: # permite correrlo manualmente

jobs:
  update:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repo
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Run update script
        run: python scripts/update_dashboard.py

      - name: Commit and push if changed
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add index.html
          git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "Auto-update: datos $(date +'%Y-%m-%d')"
          git push
